1833 cost plans do not have populated PBP_IDs. Effective with MBSF ABDC V2, a beneficiary with a 
verified or unverified date of death will have a null/missing Part C PBP_ID for any month that is after 
the death date. 

Users need to know both the Part C contract number (PTC_CNTRCT_ID_XX) and plan benefit package
